words.exampleBs: Avanturista je popeo visoku planinu.
words.exampleEn: The adventurer climbed the towering mountain.

words.exampleArabic: أَمْضَيْنَا يَوْمًا جَمِيلًا عَلَى شَاطِئِ الْبَحْرِ.
words.exampleBs: Proveli smo lijep dan na obali mora.
words.exampleEn: We spent a beautiful day on the seashore.

words.exampleBs: Rijeka teče mirno između brežuljaka.
words.exampleEn: The river flows quietly between the hills.

words.exampleBs: Mnoge životinje žive u šumi.
words.exampleEn: Many animals live in the forest.

words.exampleBs: Pustinja se proteže na ogromnim prostranstvima.
words.exampleEn: The desert stretches over vast distances.

words.exampleBs: Dolina leži između dvije visoke planine.
words.exampleEn: The valley lies between two towering mountains.

words.exampleArabic: تُحِيطُ الْمِيَاهُ بِالْجَزِيرَةِ مِنْ كُلِّ جَانِبٍ.
words.exampleBs: Vode okružuju otok sa svih strana.
words.exampleEn: Waters surround the island on every side.

words.exampleArabic: جَلَسَتِ الْأُسْرَةُ عَلَى الشَّاطِئِ تَسْتَمْتِعُ بِالشَّمْسِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica je sjedila na plaži i uživala u suncu.
words.exampleEn: The family sat on the beach enjoying the sun.

words.exampleBs: Nebo je bilo vedro i plavo.
words.exampleEn: The sky was clear and blue.

words.exampleBs: Oblak je iznenada prekrio sunce.
words.exampleEn: The cloud suddenly covered the sun.

words.exampleArabic: تُشْرِقُ الشَّمْسُ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ مِنَ الشَّرْقِ.
words.exampleBs: Sunce izlazi svako jutro na istoku.
words.exampleEn: The sun rises every morning in the east.

words.exampleBs: Puni mjesec je osvijetlio cijelu noć.
words.exampleEn: The full moon lit up the entire night.

words.exampleArabic: لَمَعَ النَّجْمُ بِشِدَّةٍ فِي سَمَاءٍ صَافِيَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Zvijezda je jarko sjala na vedrom nebu.
words.exampleEn: The star shone brightly in a clear sky.

words.exampleBs: Kiša je padala cijelu noć.
words.exampleEn: The rain fell throughout the night.

words.exampleBs: Vjetar je snažno zapuhao i oborio lišće.
words.exampleEn: The wind blew strongly and knocked down the leaves.

words.exampleBs: Bijeli snijeg prekrio je vrhove planina.
words.exampleEn: White snow covered the mountain peaks.

words.exampleBs: Lav živi na afričkoj savani.
words.exampleEn: The lion lives on the African plain.

words.exampleBs: Jahač je vješto jahao konja.
words.exampleEn: The rider rode the horse skillfully.

words.exampleBs: Ptica je pjevala na grani drveta.
words.exampleEn: The bird sang on the branch of the tree.

words.exampleBs: Riba je brzo plivala u moru.
words.exampleEn: The fish swam quickly in the sea.

words.exampleBs: Mačka je mirno spavala ispred kuće.
words.exampleEn: The cat slept quietly in front of the house.

words.exampleArabic: لَعِبَ الْكَلْبُ مَعَ الْأَطْفَالِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Pas se igrao s djecom u vrtu.
words.exampleEn: The dog played with the children in the garden.

words.exampleBs: Deva podnosi žeđ dugi niz dana.
words.exampleEn: The camel endures thirst for many days.

words.exampleBs: Orao je visoko kružio iznad planina.
words.exampleEn: The eagle soared high above the mountains.

words.exampleBs: Pastir je pazio ovcu na livadi.
words.exampleEn: The shepherd tended the sheep in the meadow.

words.exampleBs: Krava pase travu u polju.
words.exampleEn: The cow grazes on grass in the field.

words.exampleBs: Drvo je brzo raslo u proljeće.
words.exampleEn: The tree grew quickly in spring.

words.exampleArabic: تَفَتَّحَتِ الزَّهْرَةُ الْجَمِيلَةُ مَعَ بُزُوغِ الْفَجْرِ.
words.exampleBs: Lijepi cvijet se otvorio u svitanje.
words.exampleEn: The beautiful flower opened at dawn.

words.exampleBs: Trava je postala zelena nakon kiše.
words.exampleEn: The grass turned green after the rainfall.

words.exampleBs: Žuti list je pao s drveta.
words.exampleEn: The yellow leaf fell from the tree.

words.exampleBs: Seljak je ubrao zreli plod.
words.exampleEn: The farmer picked the ripe fruit.

words.exampleArabic: زَرَعَ الْمَزَارِعُ الْبَذْرَةَ فِي الْأَرْضِ الْخَصِبَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Farmer je zasijao sjeme u plodnu zemlju.
words.exampleEn: The farmer planted the seed in fertile soil.

words.exampleArabic: يَنْمُو النَّبَاتُ بِسُرْعَةٍ فِي التُّرْبَةِ الرَّطْبَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Biljka brzo raste u vlažnoj zemlji.
words.exampleEn: The plant grows quickly in moist soil.

words.exampleBs: Cvijeće cvjeta u proljeće.
words.exampleEn: The flowers bloom in the spring season.

words.exampleBs: Voda teče nježno kroz dolinu.
words.exampleEn: The water flows gently through the valley.

words.exampleArabic: تَشْرُقُ الشَّمْسُ مِنَ الْمَشْرِقِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
words.exampleBs: Sunce svaki dan izlazi na istoku.
words.exampleEn: The sun rises in the east every day.

words.exampleBs: Sunce zalazi uveče na horizontu.
words.exampleEn: The sun sets in the evening on the horizon.

words.exampleArabic: يَهْطِلُ الْمَطَرُ فِي فَصْلِ الشِّتَاءِ بِغَزَارَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Kiša pada obilno u zimskom periodu.
words.exampleEn: Rain falls heavily in the winter season.

words.exampleBs: Hladan vjetar puše sa sjevera.
words.exampleEn: Cold air blows from the north.

words.exampleArabic: كَانَ الطَّقْسُ حَارًّا جِدًّا فِي الصَّيْفِ.
words.exampleBs: Vrijeme je bilo veoma vruće ljeti.
words.exampleEn: The weather was very hot in summer.

words.exampleBs: Vrijeme je hladno zimi.
words.exampleEn: The weather is cold in winter.

words.exampleArabic: كَانَ الرَّبِيعُ دَافِئًا وَمُمْتِعًا هَذَا الْعَامَ.
words.exampleBs: Proljeće je bilo toplo i ugodno ove godine.
words.exampleEn: Spring was warm and pleasant this year.

words.exampleArabic: أَلْغَى الْمَلَّاحُونَ رِحْلَتَهُمْ بِسَبَبِ الطَّقْسِ الْعَاصِفِ.
words.exampleBs: Pomorci su otkazali putovanje zbog olujnog vremena.
words.exampleEn: The sailors cancelled their trip due to stormy weather.

words.exampleBs: Vrijeme je bilo oblačno tokom cijelog dana.
words.exampleEn: The weather was cloudy throughout the day.

words.exampleArabic: اِسْتَمْتَعَ الْأَطْفَالُ بِيَوْمٍ مُشْمِسٍ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Djeca su uživala u sunčanom danu u parku.
words.exampleEn: The children enjoyed a sunny day in the park.

words.exampleArabic: يَبْقَى الْمَنَاخُ جَافًّا فِي مَنَاطِقِ الصَّحْرَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Klima ostaje suha u pustinjskim predjelima.
words.exampleEn: The climate remains dry in desert regions.

words.exampleArabic: يَكُونُ الصَّيْفُ رَطْبًا وَحَارًّا عَلَى السَّاحِلِ.
words.exampleBs: Ljeto je vlažno i vruće na obali.
words.exampleEn: Summer is humid and hot on the coast.

words.exampleBs: Čist zrak je neophodan za zdravlje.
words.exampleEn: Clean air is essential for health.

words.exampleBs: Voda je osnova života na Zemlji.
words.exampleEn: Water is the foundation of life on Earth.

words.exampleArabic: تَشْرَبُ جُذُورُ النَّبَاتَاتِ الْمَاءَ مِنَ الْأَرْضِ.
words.exampleBs: Korijeni biljaka piju vodu iz zemlje.
words.exampleEn: Plant roots drink water from the earth.

words.exampleBs: Putnici su naložili vatru da se ugriju.
words.exampleEn: The travellers lit a fire to warm themselves.

words.exampleBs: Zelena priroda raduje srca.
words.exampleEn: Green nature delights the hearts.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ الْبِيئَةِ مِنَ التَّلَوُّثِ.
words.exampleBs: Moramo zaštititi okoliš od zagađenja.
words.exampleEn: We must protect the environment from pollution.
